description: Eval golden suite. Each case is one (trigger, output, sources/extra) fixture run through every eval registered for its trigger. The nightly job scores these; the hermetic job compares scores to suite_baseline.json to catch drift. Regenerate the baseline with: uv run python scripts/run_eval_suite.py --write-baseline

cases.output: Overview the dark mode toggle lets users switch the theme in settings. Problem statement eye strain at night. Acceptance criteria the toggle persists per user. Derived from the brainstorm_log.

sources.brainstorm_log: we want a dark mode toggle in settings that persists per user to reduce eye strain at night

cases.output: Architecture persists the theme preference per user in settings via a themes table and a preferences API that survives reload.

sources.architecture: themes table plus a preferences API
sources.PRD: MUST persist the theme preference per user in settings; acceptance criteria the toggle survives reload

cases.output: the dark mode toggle persists the theme preference per user in settings and survives reload

extra.reference: the dark mode toggle persists the theme preference per user in settings and survives reload
